steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
When  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Axis 360' and bookType 'AUDIOBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains LISTEN action button on book details screen
When  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
steps.statusMessage: Player of book The Yellow Wallpaper is not opened
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Player of book The Yellow Wallpaper is not opened
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.audiobookSteps.AudioPlayerSteps.isPlayerOpened(AudioPlayerSteps.java:40)
	at ✽.Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:234)

steps.name: Then  The first chapter is loaded
When  Open the 1 chapter on toc audiobook screen and save the chapter name as 'chapterName' and chapter number as 'chapterNumber'
And  Select 2X playback speed on playback speed audiobook screen
And  Listen a chapter on audio player screen
Then  Next chapter play automatically and chapter name is not 'chapterName' on audio player screen
